title: Mansoa montecillensis
taxonomy: Mansoa montecillensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Mansoa, which is part of the larger family of flowering plants known as angiosperms. The Bignoniaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the bignonia or jacaranda family. Mansoa montecillensis is a type of flowering vine native to South America. Its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the Bignoniaceae family.
